_meta.experiment: #53 Paper G — multi-seed (3 seeds) absorption on Spectra twins, 3 depth points
_meta.note: seed0 = original 3-point run (tags _trilm/_floatlm); seed1/2 = SAE_SEED 1/2 (tags _S1/_S2). Same BatchTopK config.

verdict: Multi-seed (3 seeds) gives error bars to the #53 twin result. TWO ROBUST contrasts (±1sd bands disjoint): (i) L15 mid ternary absorbs LESS (0.140 vs 0.237, ~1.7x); (ii) L23 late ternary absorbs MORE (0.266 vs 0.118, ~2.3x, large separation). ONE NON-robust (honest): L6 early bands overlap -> ambiguous. Ternary's mid trough + late crossover (ternary>>FP) are seed-robust in a true-twin pair. Note: at the 3 coarse points [6,15,23] the FP looks monotone-decreasing; the dense 7-point curve (seed0) shows the FP rises again at L28 (trough at L24) -> FP non-monotonicity only visible at fine resolution; the two views are consistent. Confound removed + statistics.
